codeReview.summary: The follow-up fix fully addresses the remaining provenance gap. `buildCountryCoOccurrences()` now adds every entity-linked occurrence from both countries into the pair, so `storyIds` accumulates the complete contributing event set, and the updated regression test plus a direct probe confirm FR↔US entity-derived arcs now carry both event IDs for ArcPanel's shared-intel drilldown.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The scrutiny-validator skill should document a manual-review fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail because the current subagent path can still terminate before producing any report.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: This osint-advanced scrutiny rerun again failed to launch `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` due to `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, so the remaining fix review had to be completed manually.

summary: Pass. Entity-derived geopolitical arcs now accumulate all contributing event IDs, so ArcPanel's storyIds-based shared-intel drilldown has complete supporting evidence.
